data.title: Russia Uses Seized American Company To Supply Food To Russian Army: Report
data.description: In a move that could potentially strain U.S.-Russia relations, an American company, seized by the Kremlin, is reportedly set to supply food to the Russian army.

data.title: Forge Global Eyes Strategic Expansion With $10 Million Accuidity Acquisition
data.description: Forge Global Holdings (FRGE) announced potential acquisition of Accuidity Capital Management for $10M in cash and stock, expected to enhance asset management and expand investment products.

data.title: Mark Cuban Says This Trump Healthcare Order 'Could Save Hundreds Of Billions'
data.description: Billionaire entrepreneur Mark Cuban has expressed support for President Donald Trump's 2025 healthcare executive order, emphasizing its potential to reform the role of Pharmacy Benefit Managers (PBMs) in the U.S. healthcare system.

data.title: Why Is Gene Therapy Developer uniQure Stock Trading Higher On Thursday?
data.description: uniQure's AMT-130 receives FDA Breakthrough Therapy designation for Huntington's disease, adding to Fast Track, RMAT, and Orphan Drug statuses.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Why Defiance Is Letting You Go 2X Long On Quantum, And 2X Short On AI, Straight From The CEO
data.description: Defiance ETFs launches two leveraged single-stock ETFs: RGTI for quantum computing and SMCI for AI infrastructure.
